• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code

Preterm Birth Prediction: Clinical & Environmental Features

End-to-end analysis: cleaning, EDA, GLM, and Random Forest

Hanyu Song

May 01, 2026

1 Setup

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  # data wrangling & I/O
  library(tidyverse)
  library(janitor)
  library(skimr)
  # tables & summaries
  library(gtsummary)
  library(gt)
  # plots
  library(ggcorrplot)
  library(maps)
  # modeling
  library(ranger)
  library(rsample)
  library(pROC)
  library(ResourceSelection)
  library(lmtest)
})

here::i_am("codes/full_analysis.Rmd")

2 Data Cleaning

2.1 Load raw data

t1_raw <- suppressMessages(read_csv(here::here("data", "EPIC_GA_status.csv")))
t2_raw <- suppressMessages(read_csv(here::here("data", "pull.v1.csv")))

2.2 Basic cleaning & merge

# 1.1 Cleaning t1_raw
t1 <- t1_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(encounter_nbr = as.character(encounter_nbr)) %>%
  select(encounter_nbr, admission_date, zip_code, lat, long, score, status)

# 1.2 Cleaning t2_raw
t2 <- t2_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(encounter_nbr = as.character(encounter_nbr)) %>%
  select(-x1, -address, -city, -state, -zip_code)

# 1.3 Merge t1 and t2
data_clean <- t2 %>%
  left_join(t1, by = "encounter_nbr")

data_clean <- data_clean %>%
  mutate(
    across(where(is.character), as.factor),
    across(c(preterm, obesity, gestht, htn, prom, gestdiab,
             preecl_s, fgr, diab, preecl_n, nulliparous), as.factor),
    # set white as reference group
    race = relevel(race, ref = "White")
  )

2.3 Missing values summary

missing_summary <- data_clean %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to  = "Variable",
               values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  mutate(Missing_Percentage = (Missing_Count / nrow(data_clean)) * 100) %>%
  filter(Missing_Count > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))

missing_summary

2.4 Advanced cleaning

# 2.1 Remove missing values and duplicate encounter_nbr
data_clean <- data_clean %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  distinct(encounter_nbr, .keep_all = TRUE)

# 2.2 Remove the outlier in birth_weight_oz
data_clean <- data_clean %>%
  filter(encounter_nbr != "127788738")

# 2.3 Remove the outlier found in group preterm = 0
outlier_check <- data_clean %>%
  filter(preterm == "0") %>%
  arrange(birth_weight_oz) %>%
  select(encounter_nbr, gest_age, birth_weight_oz) %>%
  head(10)

outlier_check
data_final_cleaned <- data_clean %>%
  filter(encounter_nbr != "149794760")

2.5 Save cleaned data

saveRDS(data_final_cleaned, here::here("outputs", "01_dataclean.Rds"))
write.csv(data_final_cleaned, here::here("outputs", "01_dataclean.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

3 Exploratory Analysis

3.1 Table 1 — Stratified by race

table1 <- data_final_cleaned %>%
  select(
    # Demographics
    race, age, age_cat, hisp, hospital, nulliparous, score,
    # Clinical risk factors
    obesity, htn, gestht, diab, gestdiab, preecl_n, preecl_s, prom, fgr,
    # Outcomes
    gest_age, birth_weight_oz, preterm
  ) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = race,
    label = list(
      age            ~ "Maternal Age (years)",
      age_cat        ~ "Age Category",
      hisp           ~ "Hispanic Ethnicity",
      hospital       ~ "Hospital Location",
      nulliparous    ~ "Nulliparous (First birth)",
      obesity        ~ "Obesity (BMI >= 30)",
      htn            ~ "Chronic Hypertension",
      gestht         ~ "Gestational Hypertension",
      diab           ~ "Pre-gestational Diabetes",
      gestdiab       ~ "Gestational Diabetes",
      preecl_n       ~ "Preeclampsia (Non-severe)",
      preecl_s       ~ "Severe Preeclampsia",
      prom           ~ "Premature Rupture of Membranes",
      fgr            ~ "Fetal Growth Restriction",
      gest_age       ~ "Gestational Age at Delivery (weeks)",
      birth_weight_oz ~ "Birth Weight (oz)",
      preterm        ~ "Preterm Birth (<37 weeks)"
    ),
    statistic = list(all_continuous()  ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                     all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"),
    missing = "no",
    digits  = all_continuous() ~ 1
  ) %>%
  add_p(
    test      = list(all_categorical() ~ "chisq.test"),
    test.args = list(all_categorical() ~ list(simulate.p.value = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  bold_labels()

# Save the gt version to disk
table1 %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  gt::gtsave(here::here("tables", "02_table1.html"))

3.2 Preterm birth rate by race

plot_data <- data_final_cleaned %>%
  group_by(race) %>%
  summarise(
    total         = n(),
    preterm_count = sum(preterm == "1"),
    preterm_rate  = preterm_count / total
  )

preterm_birth_rate_plot <- ggplot(
  plot_data,
  aes(x = reorder(race, -preterm_rate), y = preterm_rate, fill = race)
) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(preterm_rate, accuracy = 0.1)),
            vjust = -0.5) +
  labs(title = "Preterm Birth Rates by Race",
       y = "Preterm Rate", x = "Race") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  theme(legend.position = "none", panel.grid = element_blank())

preterm_birth_rate_plot

ggsave(
  filename = here::here("figures", "02_preterm_rate_plot.png"),
  plot     = preterm_birth_rate_plot,
  width    = 15, height = 6, dpi = 300
)

3.3 Birth weight by preterm status

birth_weight_dist_plot <- ggplot(
  data_final_cleaned,
  aes(x = preterm, y = birth_weight_oz, fill = preterm)
) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Birth Weight Distribution by Preterm Status",
       x = "Preterm (0 = No, 1 = Yes)",
       y = "Birth Weight (oz)") +
  theme_classic()

birth_weight_dist_plot

ggsave(
  filename = here::here("figures", "02_birth_weight_dist_plot.png"),
  plot     = birth_weight_dist_plot,
  width    = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300
)

3.4 Correlation of clinical risk factors

cor_data <- data_final_cleaned %>%
  select(obesity, htn, gestht, diab, gestdiab,
         preecl_n, preecl_s, prom, fgr) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.))))

corr_matrix <- cor(cor_data)

clinical_rf_heatmap <- ggcorrplot(
  corr_matrix,
  method = "square", type = "lower", lab = TRUE,
  title  = "Correlation Matrix of Risk Factors"
) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())

clinical_rf_heatmap

ggsave(
  filename = here::here("figures", "02_clinical_rf_heatmap.png"),
  plot     = clinical_rf_heatmap,
  width    = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300
)

3.5 Spatial distribution of births

ga_counties <- map_data("county", region = "georgia")

spatial_dis_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = ga_counties,
    aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = data_final_cleaned,
    aes(x = long, y = lat, color = preterm),
    alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5
  ) +
  labs(title    = "Spatial Distribution of Births",
       subtitle = "Red points indicate preterm births",
       color    = "Preterm") +
  coord_fixed(1.3) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey80", "red"))

spatial_dis_map

ggsave(
  filename = here::here("figures", "02_spatial_dis_map.png"),
  plot     = spatial_dis_map,
  width    = 6, height = 8, dpi = 300
)

4 Logistic Regression (GLM)

4.1 Merge clinical data with AlphaEarth feature A59

alphaearth_data <- read_csv(
  here::here("outputs", "Capstone_AlphaEarth_2023_1000m_extracted.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(encounter_nbr = as.character(encounter_nbr)) %>%
  select(encounter_nbr, A59)

data_all_cleaned <- data_final_cleaned %>%
  mutate(encounter_nbr = as.character(encounter_nbr)) %>%
  left_join(alphaearth_data, by = "encounter_nbr")

# set the reference race to white (already done in cleaning, but keep explicit)
data_all_cleaned$race <- relevel(as.factor(data_all_cleaned$race), ref = "White")

4.2 Base clinical model

base_model <- glm(
  preterm ~ preecl_s + age + I(age^2) + fgr + prom + htn + preecl_n +
    race + diab + hospital + hisp + nulliparous + gestdiab + obesity + gestht,
  data   = data_all_cleaned,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

summary(base_model)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = preterm ~ preecl_s + age + I(age^2) + fgr + prom + 
##     htn + preecl_n + race + diab + hospital + hisp + nulliparous + 
##     gestdiab + obesity + gestht, family = binomial(link = "logit"), 
##     data = data_all_cleaned)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                                 Estimate Std. Error z value
## (Intercept)                                   -0.9908413  0.6671748  -1.485
## preecl_s1                                      1.9984844  0.0879463  22.724
## age                                           -0.1359141  0.0420443  -3.233
## I(age^2)                                       0.0022661  0.0006774   3.345
## fgr1                                           1.5242462  0.0849526  17.942
## prom1                                          1.4981598  0.0697851  21.468
## htn1                                           1.0827431  0.0920656  11.761
## preecl_n1                                      0.5864151  0.0938437   6.249
## raceAmerican Indian/Alaska Native              0.5979390  0.5324377   1.123
## raceAsian                                     -0.1592429  0.1261502  -1.262
## raceBlack or African American                  0.0898989  0.0878060   1.024
## raceMore than One Race                        -0.1064464  0.4065789  -0.262
## raceNative Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander  0.2820633  0.6585145   0.428
## raceOther/Unknown                             -0.1767605  0.1452604  -1.217
## diab1                                          1.1677374  0.1371941   8.512
## hospitalJohns Creek                           -0.0649062  0.1022537  -0.635
## hospitalMidtown                                0.0759847  0.0649099   1.171
## hispNon-Hispanic                              -0.0601665  0.1398866  -0.430
## hispUnknown                                   -0.0685947  0.1886621  -0.364
## nulliparous1                                  -0.2314033  0.0640121  -3.615
## gestdiab1                                      0.2979254  0.0949181   3.139
## obesity1                                       0.0364349  0.0738922   0.493
## gestht1                                       -0.1641212  0.0940253  -1.746
##                                               Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                                   0.137509    
## preecl_s1                                      < 2e-16 ***
## age                                           0.001227 ** 
## I(age^2)                                      0.000822 ***
## fgr1                                           < 2e-16 ***
## prom1                                          < 2e-16 ***
## htn1                                           < 2e-16 ***
## preecl_n1                                     4.13e-10 ***
## raceAmerican Indian/Alaska Native             0.261428    
## raceAsian                                     0.206831    
## raceBlack or African American                 0.305913    
## raceMore than One Race                        0.793468    
## raceNative Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander 0.668409    
## raceOther/Unknown                             0.223660    
## diab1                                          < 2e-16 ***
## hospitalJohns Creek                           0.525587    
## hospitalMidtown                               0.241752    
## hispNon-Hispanic                              0.667116    
## hispUnknown                                   0.716168    
## nulliparous1                                  0.000300 ***
## gestdiab1                                     0.001697 ** 
## obesity1                                      0.621954    
## gestht1                                       0.080898 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 10050.6  on 14506  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance:  8384.8  on 14484  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 8430.8
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 5

4.3 Clinical model with htn × obesity interaction

interaction_model <- glm(
  preterm ~ preecl_s + age + I(age^2) + fgr + prom + htn + preecl_n +
    race + diab + hospital + hisp + nulliparous + gestdiab + obesity + gestht +
    htn:obesity,
  data   = data_all_cleaned,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

summary(interaction_model)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = preterm ~ preecl_s + age + I(age^2) + fgr + prom + 
##     htn + preecl_n + race + diab + hospital + hisp + nulliparous + 
##     gestdiab + obesity + gestht + htn:obesity, family = binomial(link = "logit"), 
##     data = data_all_cleaned)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                                 Estimate Std. Error z value
## (Intercept)                                   -0.9896819  0.6672442  -1.483
## preecl_s1                                      1.9998865  0.0880094  22.724
## age                                           -0.1359413  0.0420497  -3.233
## I(age^2)                                       0.0022673  0.0006775   3.347
## fgr1                                           1.5245665  0.0849557  17.945
## prom1                                          1.4985789  0.0697918  21.472
## htn1                                           1.0399315  0.1198830   8.675
## preecl_n1                                      0.5880896  0.0939179   6.262
## raceAmerican Indian/Alaska Native              0.5995726  0.5322765   1.126
## raceAsian                                     -0.1581562  0.1261332  -1.254
## raceBlack or African American                  0.0910187  0.0878319   1.036
## raceMore than One Race                        -0.1058733  0.4068226  -0.260
## raceNative Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander  0.2803734  0.6586646   0.426
## raceOther/Unknown                             -0.1745143  0.1453113  -1.201
## diab1                                          1.1667507  0.1372264   8.502
## hospitalJohns Creek                           -0.0652205  0.1022452  -0.638
## hospitalMidtown                                0.0761998  0.0649149   1.174
## hispNon-Hispanic                              -0.0599538  0.1398881  -0.429
## hispUnknown                                   -0.0712682  0.1887808  -0.378
## nulliparous1                                  -0.2311462  0.0640143  -3.611
## gestdiab1                                      0.2991039  0.0949614   3.150
## obesity1                                       0.0159321  0.0826501   0.193
## gestht1                                       -0.1612740  0.0941574  -1.713
## htn1:obesity1                                  0.1017311  0.1810246   0.562
##                                               Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                                   0.138011    
## preecl_s1                                      < 2e-16 ***
## age                                           0.001226 ** 
## I(age^2)                                      0.000818 ***
## fgr1                                           < 2e-16 ***
## prom1                                          < 2e-16 ***
## htn1                                           < 2e-16 ***
## preecl_n1                                     3.81e-10 ***
## raceAmerican Indian/Alaska Native             0.259983    
## raceAsian                                     0.209885    
## raceBlack or African American                 0.300070    
## raceMore than One Race                        0.794675    
## raceNative Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander 0.670349    
## raceOther/Unknown                             0.229764    
## diab1                                          < 2e-16 ***
## hospitalJohns Creek                           0.523550    
## hospitalMidtown                               0.240459    
## hispNon-Hispanic                              0.668226    
## hispUnknown                                   0.705789    
## nulliparous1                                  0.000305 ***
## gestdiab1                                     0.001634 ** 
## obesity1                                      0.847143    
## gestht1                                       0.086747 .  
## htn1:obesity1                                 0.574134    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 10050.6  on 14506  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance:  8384.5  on 14483  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 8432.5
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 5

4.4 Clinical + best spatial feature (A59) model

spatial_model <- glm(
  preterm ~ preecl_s + age + I(age^2) + fgr + prom + htn + preecl_n +
    race + diab + hospital + hisp + nulliparous + gestdiab + obesity + gestht +
    A59,
  data   = data_all_cleaned,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

summary(spatial_model)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = preterm ~ preecl_s + age + I(age^2) + fgr + prom + 
##     htn + preecl_n + race + diab + hospital + hisp + nulliparous + 
##     gestdiab + obesity + gestht + A59, family = binomial(link = "logit"), 
##     data = data_all_cleaned)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                                 Estimate Std. Error z value
## (Intercept)                                   -1.2536174  0.6745803  -1.858
## preecl_s1                                      1.9944646  0.0880201  22.659
## age                                           -0.1351061  0.0420544  -3.213
## I(age^2)                                       0.0022712  0.0006773   3.353
## fgr1                                           1.5216108  0.0850300  17.895
## prom1                                          1.5008281  0.0698356  21.491
## htn1                                           1.0782417  0.0921769  11.698
## preecl_n1                                      0.5883067  0.0938828   6.266
## raceAmerican Indian/Alaska Native              0.5966371  0.5299696   1.126
## raceAsian                                     -0.1703839  0.1262357  -1.350
## raceBlack or African American                  0.0589165  0.0885081   0.666

## raceNative Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander  0.2553651  0.6576154   0.388
## raceOther/Unknown                             -0.1923771  0.1456013  -1.321
## diab1                                          1.1573086  0.1374400   8.420
## hospitalJohns Creek                           -0.0383765  0.1028238  -0.373
## hospitalMidtown                                0.0993815  0.0654626   1.518
## hispNon-Hispanic                              -0.0566984  0.1400877  -0.405
## hispUnknown                                   -0.0662394  0.1888929  -0.351

## gestdiab1                                      0.2896751  0.0950130   3.049
## obesity1                                       0.0271459  0.0739909   0.367
## gestht1                                       -0.1697453  0.0941549  -1.803
## A59                                           -3.3402309  1.2363372  -2.702
##                                               Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                                   0.063117 .  
## preecl_s1                                      < 2e-16 ***

## I(age^2)                                      0.000799 ***
## fgr1                                           < 2e-16 ***

## preecl_n1                                     3.69e-10 ***

## hospitalMidtown                               0.128979

## AIC: 8425.6

## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 5

4.5 Likelihood-ratio comparisons

# Compare clinical vs clinical + interaction
lrtest(base_model, interaction_model)
# Compare clinical vs clinical + best spatial feature
lrtest(base_model, spatial_model)

4.6 Table 2 — final spatial model

tbl_model <- spatial_model %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>%
  add_global_p() %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_model

tbl_model %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  gt::gtsave(here::here("tables", "03_table2_model.html"))

4.7 Goodness of fit (Hosmer–Lemeshow)

hoslem.test(spatial_model$y, fitted(spatial_model))
## 
##  Hosmer and Lemeshow goodness of fit (GOF) test
## 
## data:  spatial_model$y, fitted(spatial_model)
## X-squared = 3.3473, df = 8, p-value = 0.9107

5 Random Forest

5.1 Build modeling dataset

all_feature_data <- read_csv(
  here::here("outputs", "Capstone_AlphaEarth_2023_1000m_extracted.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(encounter_nbr = as.character(encounter_nbr))

all_clinical_data <- read_csv(
  here::here("outputs", "01_dataclean.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(encounter_nbr = as.character(encounter_nbr))

combined_data <- all_clinical_data %>%
  inner_join(all_feature_data, by = "encounter_nbr") %>%
  select(-any_of(c(
    "...1", "encounter_nbr",
    "gest_age", "age_cat",
    "birth_weight_oz",
    "lat", "long", ".geo",
    "system:index",
    "zip_code", "score",
    "status",
    "admission_date.x", "admission_date.y",
    "buffer_m", "center_lat", "center_long"
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    preterm = as.factor(preterm),
    across(where(is.character), as.factor)
  )

dim(combined_data)
## [1] 14507    79
head(combined_data)

5.2 Train / test split (stratified on preterm)

set.seed(2026)
data_split <- initial_split(combined_data, prop = 0.8, strata = preterm)

train_data <- training(data_split)
test_data  <- testing(data_split)

dim(train_data)
## [1] 11605    79
dim(test_data)
## [1] 2902   79
prop.table(table(train_data$preterm))
## 
##         0         1 
## 0.8900474 0.1099526
prop.table(table(test_data$preterm))
## 
##         0         1 
## 0.8900758 0.1099242

5.3 Full model (all variables)

n_tree <- 500

rf_model <- ranger(
  formula     = preterm ~ .,
  data        = train_data,
  num.trees   = n_tree,
  importance  = "impurity",
  probability = TRUE,
  seed        = 2026
)

print(rf_model)
## Ranger result
## 
## Call:
##  ranger(formula = preterm ~ ., data = train_data, num.trees = n_tree,      importance = "impurity", probability = TRUE, seed = 2026) 
## 
## Type:                             Probability estimation 
## Number of trees:                  500 
## Sample size:                      11605 
## Number of independent variables:  78 
## Mtry:                             8 
## Target node size:                 10 
## Variable importance mode:         impurity 
## Splitrule:                        gini 
## OOB prediction error (Brier s.):  0.08880236
saveRDS(rf_model,
        here::here("outputs", paste0("03_rf_full_model_", n_tree, "trees.Rds")))

5.4 Clinical-only model

train_data_clinical_only <- train_data %>%
  select(-starts_with("A", ignore.case = FALSE))
test_data_clinical_only  <- test_data %>%
  select(-starts_with("A", ignore.case = FALSE))

dim(train_data_clinical_only)
## [1] 11605    15
dim(test_data_clinical_only)
## [1] 2902   15
rf_model_clinical <- ranger(
  formula     = preterm ~ .,
  data        = train_data_clinical_only,
  num.trees   = n_tree,
  importance  = "impurity",
  probability = TRUE,
  seed        = 2026
)

print(rf_model_clinical)
## Ranger result
## 
## Call:
##  ranger(formula = preterm ~ ., data = train_data_clinical_only,      num.trees = n_tree, importance = "impurity", probability = TRUE,      seed = 2026) 
## 
## Type:                             Probability estimation 
## Number of trees:                  500 
## Sample size:                      11605 
## Number of independent variables:  14 
## Mtry:                             3 
## Target node size:                 10 
## Variable importance mode:         impurity 
## Splitrule:                        gini 
## OOB prediction error (Brier s.):  0.08446823
saveRDS(rf_model_clinical,
        here::here("outputs", paste0("03_rf_clinical_model_", n_tree, "trees.Rds")))

# Baseline ROC for DeLong tests
pred_probs_clinical <- predict(rf_model_clinical, data = test_data_clinical_only)$predictions[, "1"]
rf_roc_clinical <- roc(test_data_clinical_only$preterm, pred_probs_clinical,
                       levels = c("0", "1"), quiet = TRUE)

5.5 Search for best single environmental feature

spatial_features <- sprintf("A%02d", 0:63)

auc_delong_results <- data.frame(
  Feature          = character(),
  AUC              = numeric(),
  DeLong_Pvalue    = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (feat in spatial_features) {
  if (feat %in% names(train_data)) {

    temp_train <- train_data %>%
      select(-starts_with("A", ignore.case = FALSE), all_of(feat))
    temp_test  <- test_data %>%
      select(-starts_with("A", ignore.case = FALSE), all_of(feat))

    temp_rf <- ranger(
      formula     = preterm ~ .,
      data        = temp_train,
      num.trees   = n_tree,
      importance  = "none",
      probability = TRUE,
      seed        = 2026
    )

    temp_preds  <- predict(temp_rf, data = temp_test)$predictions[, "1"]
    temp_roc    <- roc(test_data$preterm, temp_preds,
                       levels = c("0", "1"), quiet = TRUE)
    temp_auc    <- as.numeric(temp_roc$auc)
    delong_test <- roc.test(rf_roc_clinical, temp_roc, method = "delong")

    auc_delong_results <- rbind(auc_delong_results, data.frame(
      Feature       = feat,
      AUC           = temp_auc,
      DeLong_Pvalue = delong_test$p.value
    ))
  }
}

final_evaluation_board <- auc_delong_results %>%
  arrange(desc(AUC)) %>%
  mutate(
    AUC           = round(AUC, 4),
    DeLong_Pvalue = round(DeLong_Pvalue, 4),
    Significant   = ifelse(DeLong_Pvalue < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
  )

head(final_evaluation_board, 15)
write.csv(final_evaluation_board,
          here::here("outputs", "03_All_Features_DeLong_Results.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

5.6 Train RF with clinical + best feature

best_feature <- final_evaluation_board$Feature[1]
message("Best feature: ", best_feature,
        " (AUC = ", round(final_evaluation_board$AUC[1], 4), ")")

train_data_selected <- train_data %>%
  select(-starts_with("A", ignore.case = FALSE), all_of(best_feature))
test_data_selected  <- test_data %>%
  select(-starts_with("A", ignore.case = FALSE), all_of(best_feature))

rf_model_selected <- ranger(
  formula     = preterm ~ .,
  data        = train_data_selected,
  num.trees   = n_tree,
  importance  = "impurity",
  probability = TRUE,
  seed        = 2026
)

saveRDS(rf_model_selected,
        here::here("outputs", paste0("03_rf_selected_model_", n_tree, "trees.Rds")))

5.7 ROC curve comparison

# Full model
preds_probs_full <- predict(rf_model, data = test_data)$predictions[, "1"]
rf_roc_full <- roc(test_data$preterm, preds_probs_full,
                   levels = c("0", "1"), quiet = TRUE)

# Clinical + top environmental feature
pred_probs_selected <- predict(rf_model_selected, data = test_data_selected)$predictions[, "1"]
rf_roc_selected <- roc(test_data_selected$preterm, pred_probs_selected,
                       levels = c("0", "1"), quiet = TRUE)

plot(rf_roc_full,     col = "blue",  lwd = 2,
     main = "ROC Curve Comparison (Preterm Prediction)")
plot(rf_roc_clinical, col = "red",   lwd = 2, lty = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(rf_roc_selected, col = "green", lwd = 2, lty = 2, add = TRUE)

legend(
  "bottomright",
  legend = c(paste("Full Model (AUC:",     round(rf_roc_full$auc, 3),     ")"),
             paste("Clinical Model (AUC:", round(rf_roc_clinical$auc, 3), ")"),
             paste("Clinical + Top Env. (AUC:", round(rf_roc_selected$auc, 3), ")")),
  col = c("blue", "red", "green"),
  lty = c(1, 2, 2), lwd = 2
)

message("Full model AUC: ",                    rf_roc_full$auc)
message("Clinical Model AUC: ",                rf_roc_clinical$auc)
message("Clinical + Top Environmental AUC: ",  rf_roc_selected$auc)

5.8 Variable importance

importance_df <- data.frame(
  Feature    = names(rf_model$variable.importance),
  Importance = as.numeric(rf_model$variable.importance)
) %>% arrange(desc(Importance))
head(importance_df, 20)
importance_df_clinical <- data.frame(
  Feature    = names(rf_model_clinical$variable.importance),
  Importance = as.numeric(rf_model_clinical$variable.importance)
) %>% arrange(desc(Importance))
importance_df_clinical
importance_df_selected <- data.frame(
  Feature    = names(rf_model_selected$variable.importance),
  Importance = as.numeric(rf_model_selected$variable.importance)
) %>% arrange(desc(Importance))
importance_df_selected

5.9 DeLong tests

# Clinical vs Full
roc_compare_1 <- roc.test(rf_roc_clinical, rf_roc_full, method = "delong")
roc_compare_1
## 
##  DeLong's test for two correlated ROC curves
## 
## data:  rf_roc_clinical and rf_roc_full
## Z = 1.0786, p-value = 0.2808
## alternative hypothesis: true difference in AUC is not equal to 0
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##  -0.009415647  0.032459979
## sample estimates:
## AUC of roc1 AUC of roc2 
##   0.7713723   0.7598501
# Clinical vs Clinical + Top environmental
roc_compare_2 <- roc.test(rf_roc_clinical, rf_roc_selected, method = "delong")
roc_compare_2
## 
##  DeLong's test for two correlated ROC curves
## 
## data:  rf_roc_clinical and rf_roc_selected
## Z = -1.4745, p-value = 0.1404
## alternative hypothesis: true difference in AUC is not equal to 0
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##  -0.017017737  0.002405678
## sample estimates:
## AUC of roc1 AUC of roc2 
##   0.7713723   0.7786783
